_note: Digital Asset Links for the Android TWA (e.g. a PWABuilder/Bubblewrap build). Get the SHA-256 fingerprint from Play Console → App integrity → App signing → SHA-256 certificate fingerprint, then replace the placeholder below. If your TWA's package name isn't 'app.ryse', update package_name too. Served at https://ryse-os.vercel.app/.well-known/assetlinks.json
